untranslatable_reason: AEDB (Ascending Expanding Diamond Bottom) is a visual chart pattern that requires multi-bar geometric pattern recognition (diamond shape with expanding width during uptrend). This cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Bar Properties). Pattern detection requires shape analysis across multiple candles which is outside the scope of single-bar indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted to provide a generic breakout logic (close above previous high = breakout confirmation) but this does NOT capture the specific AEDB pattern geometry. The signal requires a dedicated pattern recognition module or custom indicator. Success rate of 73% in bull markets and 54% decline in busted patterns are documented but cannot be operationalized without pattern detection. Stop-loss set to 5.4% based on busted pattern decline metric mentioned in source. Hold days estimated at 30 based on typical pattern hold periods.
